testcase.name: installapp

error.message:
An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command 'C:\\Users\\pavan\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe -P 5037 -s 89d3da547d04 install -r 'C:\\Users\\pavan\\Downloads\\APK Files\\Touch Screen Test_v1.7.14_apkpure.com.apk'' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb: failed to install C:\Users\pavan\Downloads\APK Files\Touch Screen Test_v1.7.14_apkpure.com.apk: Failure [INSTALL_FAILED_USER_RESTRICTED: Install canceled by user]
Build info: version: '3.141.59', revision: 'e82be7d358', time: '2018-11-14T08:17:03' System info: host: 'LAPTOP-3UV6SH1O', ip: '192.168.63.1', os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '16.0.1' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Capabilities {app: C:\Users\pavan\Downloads\AP..., appPackage: com.androidsample.generalstore, automationName: Appium, databaseEnabled: false, desired: {app: C:\Users\pavan\Downloads\AP..., automationName: Appium, deviceName: Redmi 4a, platformName: android, platformVersion: 7.1.2, udid: 89d3da547d04}, deviceApiLevel: 25, deviceManufacturer: Xiaomi, deviceModel: Redmi 4A, deviceName: 89d3da547d04, deviceScreenDensity: 320, deviceScreenSize: 720x1280, deviceUDID: 89d3da547d04, javascriptEnabled: true, locationContextEnabled: false, networkConnectionEnabled: true, pixelRatio: 2, platform: LINUX, platformName: Android, platformVersion: 7.1.2, statBarHeight: 50, takesScreenshot: true, udid: 89d3da547d04, viewportRect: {height: 1230, left: 0, top: 50, width: 720}, warnings: {}, webStorageEnabled: false} Session ID: 2976dd94-e8ef-43fe-8bf1-a3b122c195d0
